languages.text: {n}Из вокс-решетки Вольного Торговца раздается скрежет, в котором вы не сразу распознаете смех. Появившимся словно из воздуха платком Себериан промокает выступившую в уголке глаза слезу.{/n} "Война отбирает жизни у одних и рассудок — у других. Бог-Император, помилуй эт{mf|ого|у} бедолагу".

{n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."
languages.original_text: {n}Из вокс-решетки Вольного Торговца раздается скрежет, в котором вы не сразу распознаете смех. languages.text: {n}行商浪人的音阵格栅发出一声尖啸，你过了片刻才意识到那是笑声。塞贝里安用不知从哪儿掏出来的绢帕，轻轻擦了擦眼角的泪。{/n}“战争会夺走一些人的性命，也会夺走另一些人的神智。神皇啊，怜悯这个可怜人吧。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}行商浪人的音阵格栅发出一声尖啸，你过了片刻才意识到那是笑声。塞贝里安用不知从哪儿掏出来的绢帕，轻轻擦了擦眼角的泪。{/n}“战争会夺走一些人的性命，也会夺走另一些人的神智。神皇啊，怜悯这个可怜人吧。”

languages.text: {n}De la grille-vox du libre-marchand s'élève un hurlement dans lequel vous finissez par reconnaître un rire. Seberian essuie une larme au coin de son œil à l'aide d'un mouchoir qui semble surgi de nulle part.{/n} « La guerre prive certaines personnes de leur vie, d'autres de leur santé mentale. Empereur-Dieu, ayez pitié de cette âme égarée. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."

Empereur-Dieu, ayez pitié de cette âme égarée. »

languages.text: {n}Hür Tacir'in voks ızgarasından başta kahkaha olduğunu anlayamadığın bir cızırtı yükseliyor. Seberian, gözünün kenarındaki bir damla yaşı ilk bakışta yoktan var olan bir mendille siliyor.{/n} "Savaşta kimileri canını, kimileri aklını yitirir. Tanrı İmparator bu zavallı ruha merhamet eylesin."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."

Tanrı İmparator bu zavallı ruha merhamet eylesin."

languages.text: {n}La rejilla de voco del Comerciante Independiente emite un chirrido que tardas en reconocer como risa. Seberian se seca una lágrima con un pañuelo que parece sacar del aire.{/n} «La guerra se cobra las vidas de unos y la cordura de otros. Que el Dios Emperador se apiade de esta alma desdichada».
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}La rejilla de voco del Comerciante Independiente emite un chirrido que tardas en reconocer como risa. Seberian se seca una lágrima con un pañuelo que parece sacar del aire.{/n} «La guerra se cobra las vidas de unos y la cordura de otros. Que el Dios Emperador se apiade de esta alma desdichada».

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Gitter des Freihändlers ertönt ein Kreischen, das du nicht sofort als Lachen erkennst. Seberian wischt sich mit eine Taschentuch, das scheinbar aus dem Nichts erschienen ist, eine Träne aus dem Augenwinkel.{/n} "Der Kriegt raubt den einen das Leben, den anderen den Verstand. Gottimperator, erbarme dich dieser armen Seele."
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Gitter des Freihändlers ertönt ein Kreischen, das du nicht sofort als Lachen erkennst. Seberian wischt sich mit eine Taschentuch, das scheinbar aus dem Nichts erschienen ist, eine Träne aus dem Augenwinkel.{/n} "Der Kriegt raubt den einen das Leben, den anderen den Verstand. Gottimperator, erbarme dich dieser armen Seele."

languages.text: {n}ローグ・トレーダーのヴォックス・グリルが、すぐには笑い声とは分からぬ甲高い音を発する。セベリアンは、どこからともなく現れたハンカチで目尻の涙をぬぐう。{/n}「戦は、ある者の命を、またある者の正気を奪う。神帝陛下よ、この哀れな魂に慈悲を。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Rogue Trader's vox-grille emits a screech that you do not immediately recognise as laughter. Seberian dabs at a tear at the corner of his eye with a handkercher that seemingly appeared out of thin air.{/n} "War claims the lives of some and the sanity of others. God-Emperor, have mercy on this poor soul."

traits.locale_text: {n}ローグ・トレーダーのヴォックス・グリルが、すぐには笑い声とは分からぬ甲高い音を発する。セベリアンは、どこからともなく現れたハンカチで目尻の涙をぬぐう。{/n}「戦は、ある者の命を、またある者の正気を奪う。神帝陛下よ、この哀れな魂に慈悲を。」
